assertions: evidence_cited: concrete numbers/files/commands behind every verdict
calibrated_confidence: numeric, justified, matched to evidence strength (no house number)
multiple_comparisons_named: 35-cell family / expected false positives stated
cell_size_computed: the tiny Tuesday-feb cell quantified
holdout_demanded: fresh-data or temporal-holdout named as the settling probe
campaign_blocked: recommends against acting on the finding
